query: SELECT u.name AS agentName, b.agentId, COUNT(b2.id) AS priorBookings FROM bookings b JOIN users u ON u.id = b.agentId LEFT JOIN bookings b2 ON b2.agentId = b.agentId AND b2.createdAt < '2026-05-18 00:00:00' WHERE b.createdAt >= '2026-05-18 00:00:00' GROUP BY b.agentId, u.name HAVING priorBookings = 0 LIMIT 10
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4PycK9Y631tLhJa.0110aa12e67a --database PdcDVQRp8zC2FzsyWBWptW --execute SELECT u.name AS agentName, b.agentId, COUNT(b2.id) AS priorBookings FROM bookings b JOIN users u ON u.id = b.agentId LEFT JOIN bookings b2 ON b2.agentId = b.agentId AND b2.createdAt < '2026-05-18 00:00:00' WHERE b.createdAt >= '2026-05-18 00:00:00' GROUP BY b.agentId, u.name HAVING priorBookings = 0 LIMIT 10
